recommendations.title: Case départ
recommendations.overview: Two contempo Frenchmen of Antillean descent visit their ancestor's time as well as their land in the slavery-themed French era.
recommendations.director: Thomas Ngijol, Lionel Steketee, Fabrice Eboué

recommendations.title: Coexist
recommendations.overview: An opportunistic music producer brings together a rabbi, a priest, and an imam to preach about peaceful coexistence through song. But he's in for a surprise when he realizes the religious leaders are far from saints.

recommendations.title: The Brand New Adventures of Aladdin
recommendations.overview: After freeing Baghdad from its terrible ruler, Aladin delays his marriage to the princess until a new dictator arrives to take over the city.

recommendations.title: Simply Black
recommendations.overview: A failed 40 year old comedian wants to organize the first Black protests in France but meeting with other French celebrities of the Black community will make it a whole new adventure.
